title: create_nethercraft
description: A create-related mod.You can synthesize new things through some formulas .but now currently only supports the Ancient Debris
body:
MOD Content:
New Material: Obtain ancient flour by crushing ancient hellstone.
Material Synthesis: Convert coal blocks into ancient debris using sequence assembly.
Added Nether content that lacks mechanical power.

Update Direction: I am a new mod author, and I will gradually add unique mod content in the future :).
Suggestions: Feel free to leave kind feedback and propose mod update content.
